title: Lucky's Blocky Siege
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/167d4425de52a14eb48ed4b96fbc63ac99a5da5e.png)Cannons, Mortars, and more! Offers great defensive and fun gameplay mechanics.

5.0 Released, Geckolib is now required!!!!

# Features

- Cannon - Great for busting down walls.
- Mortar - Fires projectiles over walls.
- Giant Cannon - Even better for busting down walls.
- Ballista Golem - A friendly sentry for dealing with pesky foes.
- Spewer Golem - Burn your enemies away with a powerful crowd-controlling blast from the spewer.
- Crusher - Crusher your enemies with a massive stone. Give it a redstone signal and take a step back as it slams into the ground!
- Cast Iron Block Set
- Reinforced variants for all vanilla doors.
- Variety of ammo for each defense.

# How to Use

Cannon/Mortar/Giant Cannon: 
1. Load middle slot with Projectile Type
2. Provide gunpowder
3. Light Cannon with flint and steel or redstone.
4. Boom

Ballista Golem:
1. Build it (Check images for example)
2. Place arrows inside
3. Watch it go

Spewer:
1. Build it (Check images for example)
2. Provide Lava Buckets or pump lava into it using mods that provide this feature
3. Optional: Place lava around it to heat the spewer, providing more damage. (overfilling the spewer does this automatically)
4. Watch it go

# Roadmap

- Add a new villager called the Siege Master.
- Add a pillager outpost with cannons on it.
- Add a pillager that pushes a cannon cart and attacks during raids!
- Add a cannon cart, a cannon you can push around, aim, and fire!
